client_psychology: Clients view nails as self-expression and a small luxury they can afford regularly. They browse Instagram and TikTok for design inspiration before booking. Nail art photos are the primary sales tool — your portfolio IS your marketing. Clients are loyal to their nail tech but will switch for better artistry or availability. Consistency in quality and appointment availability matters more than price for most clients.
